title: Man Faints After Realizing He Accidentally Killed His Wife
description:
If you’re ever injured in an accident, you can check out Morgan & Morgan. You can start your claim in just a click without having to leave your couch: https://ForThePeople.com/DrInsanity
---
Multi-millionaire business owner Matthew Mollicone drives his wife Kimberly to confront her secret lover, Daniele Giannone. Minutes later, a gunfight erupts outside Daniele’s home, leaving Kimberly dead in the crossfire.

What follows is a tense investigation involving surveillance footage, disputed self-defense claims, and a courtroom battle that divided Michigan. Because the man who fired the fatal shot isn’t the one who ended up behind bars.
